description: EXPERIMENTAL frequency-tuned spec generated by the Aero optimizer. Sandbox-only artifact; do not promote into root config without a benchmark win.

custom_errors.@: Unexpected character '@' - not a valid token
custom_errors.#: Unexpected character '#' - not a valid token
custom_errors.$: Unexpected character '$' - not a valid token
custom_errors.~: Unexpected character '~' - not a valid token
custom_errors.`: Unexpected character '`' - not a valid token
